penalties.description: Error in labeling pillar/mast heights or positions

steps.expected_logic: Identify correct relative positions of S, H, O, G, and T
Determine height of the mast as 52 m

combined_text:
--- SUB-PART 9(a) (Marks: 3) ---
- Step 1: Identify correct relative positions of S, H, O, G, and T | Eq: $(10m, 28^\circ, 70^\circ)$ | Mark: B3(3)
  [PENALTY] ee: -0.5

--- SUB-PART 9(b)(i) (Marks: 5) ---
- Step 1: Define OS = OT = x | Eq: [unreadable definition] | Mark: [unreadable]([unreadable])
- Step 2: Use tan ratio in \triangle OSH | Eq: \tan 28 = \frac{10}{|OS|} | Mark: M1(1)
- Step 3: Calculate |OS| | Eq: |OS| = \frac{10}{\tan 28} = 18.8076 | Mark: A1(1)
- Step 4: Calculate |TG| using \triangle OTG | Eq: \tan 70 = \frac{|TG|}{18.8076} | Mark: M1(1)
- Step 5: Find value of |TG| | Eq: |TG| = 2.7475 \times 18.8076 = 51.6739 | Mark: A1(1)
- Step 6: Determine height of the mast as 52 m | Eq: Height = 52\text{m} | Mark: A1(1)

--- SUB-PART 9(b)(ii) (Marks: 4) ---
- Step 1: Compute PG | Eq: |PG| = 51.6739 - 10 = 41.6739\text{m} | Mark: B1(1)
- Step 2: Use Pythagorean theorem for HG | Eq: |HG| = \sqrt{(2 \times 18.8076)^2 + (41.6739)^2} | Mark: M1(1)
- Step 3: Simplify and compute |HG| | Eq: |HG| = \sqrt{414.9033 + 1736.7139} = 56.1393 | Mark: A1(1)
- Step 4: State the height as 56 m | Eq: [unreadable] | Mark: A1(1)
  [PENALTY] ou: -1
